tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Should Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Should Have का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I should have come earlier. You should have apologized to him. He should have worked harder. I should have told this earlier. We should have been more careful.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Should Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Should Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You should have listened to him. She should have told the truth. I should have read this book. We should have arrived on time. You should not have made this mistake.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसे मुझे बताना चाहिए था।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I shoulds have told this earlier."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I should have told this earlier.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Should Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Should Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We should have thought earlier. You should have stopped him. She should not have left this job. I should have practiced more.
